where.if: AND joined_at < (CAST(#{criteria.joinedTo} AS DATE) + INTERVAL '1 day')

if.test: criteria.gender != null and criteria.gender != '' and criteria.gender != 'ALL'
criteria.memberStatus != null and criteria.memberStatus != '' and criteria.memberStatus != 'ALL'
criteria.restriction != null and criteria.restriction != '' and criteria.restriction != 'ALL'

mapper.select:
SELECT joined_at AS joinedAt, masked_name AS name, masked_phone AS phone, customer_id AS customerId, birth_date AS birthDate, gender, member_status AS memberStatus, converted_at AS convertedAt, restriction, inflow_channel AS inflowChannel FROM member
ORDER BY joined_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
